title: Simply's Better Cave Exploration
description: A small mod that adds a few features to make cave exploration a bit better
body:
This mod adds a few features to help with cave exploration! features will be listed below
- Throwable torches
- Lava Lantern (when held places a light block of 12 at your player's location)
- Bat-Pack (when clicked on lets you store 6 stacks of items in it)
- Ancient Spike vines & Ancient Thorns (Ancient thorns are a projectile that when thrown gives the target poisen)
- Raw Ore Blocks are smeltable now
- 2 new achievments
- 1 new structure
This does not change the generation of caves (other then spawning ancient spike vines) and is ment to be a smaller mod.
